purpose: Prove the douyin video-link analysis path works end-to-end through the real OpenClaw product API.
notes_on_redaction: No account/password/cookie/token/database URL/model key recorded. No raw video URLs or resolved CDN direct URLs recorded. Model analysis text not stored verbatim; only length + sha256 + bounded structural fields.

dify_core_invariants.docker-api-1_startedAt: 2026-06-09T13:36:22Z (already at this value before this session; not changed by this test)

reproducibility: Three consecutive end-to-end runs all reached status=succeeded (job prefixes dc30728c, c6241220, 259871cb); the third captured the full analysis result payload.

diagnostic_findings.video_path_health: Regular douyin /video/ links resolve to a douyinvod.com CDN direct URL via the deployed vendored resolver (iesdouyin SSR _ROUTER_DATA extraction); Doubao (doubao-seed-2-0-pro) analyzes that URL directly and returns a structured Chinese short-video analysis.
diagnostic_findings.image_text_notes_gap: douyin /note/ image-text posts (aweme_type=2, e.g. OOTD slideshows) have video.duration=0 and no real video stream; the video path cannot analyze them. Supporting them needs an image_url (image-analysis) path, tracked as separate work.
diagnostic_findings.reference_project: D:/DESK/视频解析/源文件/tik douyin_chong is the upstream of the vendored copy; its extra robustness value is the inline base64 fallback (download bytes -> data: URL) for cases where Doubao cannot fetch a CDN URL.
